mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( user_login_id, user_name, user_nickname, user_pw, user_birth_date, user_phone, user_email ) VALUES ( #{userLoginId}, #{userName}, #{userNickname}, #{userPw}, #{userBirthDate}, #{userPhone}, #{userEmail} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET user_nickname = #{userNickname}, user_phone = #{userPhone}, user_birth_date = #{userBirthDate} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_status = 'active'
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_login_id, user_name, user_nickname, user_pw, user_birth_date, user_phone, user_email, user_regist_date, deleted_at, user_status FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT user_id, user_login_id, user_name, user_nickname, user_pw, user_birth_date, user_phone, user_email, user_regist_date, deleted_at, user_status FROM user WHERE user_login_id = #{userLoginId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET user_status = 'inactive', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_status = 'active'
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM user WHERE user_login_id = #{userLoginId}
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM user WHERE user_nickname = #{userNickname}
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM user WHERE user_email = #{userEmail}
